title: U.S. Treasury yields soar after Donald Trump says Iran ceasefire is ‘over’
summary_full: Treasury yields surged after President Donald Trump told the NATO summit that the ceasefire with Iran is over.
summary_public: Treasury yields surged after President Donald Trump told the NATO summit that the ceasefire with Iran is over.
